_comment: Default learning profile template for new users
_usage: This template is used when creating new user profiles

information_density.notes: Default: Concepts + examples. Will adapt based on user interactions.

example_preference.notes: Default: Real examples from work. Most users prefer concrete over abstract.

depth_approach.notes: Default: Big picture first. Common preference for most learners.

interaction_style.notes: Default: Demonstrate then explain. Balanced approach for new users.

error_tolerance.notes: Default: Guided experimentation. Will adjust based on user comfort level.

_defaults_rationale.information_density: moderate - Most users prefer balance between detail and brevity
_defaults_rationale.example_preference: concrete - Real-world examples are universally more effective
_defaults_rationale.depth_approach: top_down - Understanding context before details is common
_defaults_rationale.interaction_style: show_and_explain - Balanced approach works for most
_defaults_rationale.error_tolerance: medium - Start cautious, increase as user shows comfort
_defaults_rationale.confidence: 0.5 - Low confidence means system will adapt quickly to user's actual style
